User confirmed PicoArch PS1 gameplay after the VFS seek fix; video/audio/input/performance accepted. Initial failure was cdrom read failed for lba 4 because PCSX-ReARMed expects C fseek semantics from VFS seek.

N64 is retired from the FE verification target set. plumOS does not build or deploy N64 cores; the original FE failure was a missing core. A temporary stock-core probe reached RetroArch GLES2/dynarec initialization, but those stock binaries are not part of plumOS core deployment.

N64 is retired from the FE verification target set. plumOS does not build or deploy N64 cores; the original FE failure was a missing core. A temporary stock-core probe reached RetroArch GLES2/dynarec initialization, but those stock binaries are not part of plumOS core deployment.

N64 is retired from the FE verification target set. PicoArch is not a suitable N64 target here: stock mupen64plus requires OpenGL frontend support, and stock parallel_n64 reached emulation logs but produced a black capture under PicoArch.
